requires.rationale: single badge aggregates ≥2 underlying signals (deprecation + incident + freshness)

structure.description: Single hero badge derived from multiple aspect-states. Badge color/icon resolved from worst-of (deprecated > incident > stale > healthy). Click expands to itemized breakdown of contributing signals.

rationale.hypothesis: Listing N independent badges scatters attention. Aggregating into a composite indicator gives instant 'is this thing OK to use' answer; click reveals why.

evidence.description: Health badge aggregates deprecation + incident + freshness
Service status rolled up from N checks

counterexample.description: If only one health dimension exists, no aggregation needed
